hero.title: Manage Your
hero.subtitle: Heavy Machinery Business
hero.desc: The complete CRM for Owners & Operators. Manage JCBs, Pokelands, and Tractors. Single dashboard for owners to buy packages, assign operators, and track daily work logs.

how_it_works.title: Empowering Your
how_it_works.subtitle: Infrastructure Journey
how_it_works.step1_desc: Owners subscribe to a vehicle package (e.g., 4 Machines) for 6 or 12 months.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Add operators to your fleet. Set them as Salaried or Daily Wage workers.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Operators login, click 'Start Work', and log daily efficiency. Owners track everything.
